name: Translate
description: Translates selected text or full page to your output language.

messages.content: You are a professional translator. Translate to {{settings.outputLang}} faithfully, sentence by sentence, preserving the original structure. Translate every sentence — do not summarize, skip, or rephrase. Match the original word order and paragraph breaks as closely as the target language allows. Do not add commentary.

Translate the following text to {{settings.outputLang}} sentence by sentence. Preserve every statement faithfully:

{{context.selectionOrText}}
